requires.rationale: entity has explicit upstream/downstream edge sub-entity

structure.description: Lineage rendered as a directed graph-canvas with current entity centered, upstream-left / downstream-right, typed icons per node kind. Canvas-controls toolbar overlays depth/hop/type/time-range filters. Click on edge or node drills into that entity.

rationale.hypothesis: Tabular lineage forces the user to mentally reconstruct topology. A 2D canvas with directionality renders dependency graph natively; depth filter prevents combinatorial explosion.

evidence.description: Lineage tab — graph canvas with depth/hop/time filters as overlay

counterexample.description: When most entities have 0–1 upstream, list view is sufficient

shouldMatch.reason: Workflow nodes form DAG with typed edges
